label: Gather Preferences
description: Collect mandatory trip requirements: dates/window, origin, group, budget/currency, destination intent, plus useful constraints/defaults

label: Shortlist Destination/Place Options
description: Present choice-first option cards: 3-5 broad destinations or 8-10 places inside a chosen country/region, each with fit, days, logistics, budget, season, and tradeoff

label: Select Places
description: Let the user choose places from the option menu before researching detailed activities

label: Research Activity Options
description: For selected places, present 4-6 real activity/experience options per place, grouped by practicality, and ask the user to choose/approve

label: Plan Itinerary
description: Build a day-by-day itinerary from approved places and activities with transit, meals, check-in/out, and downtime

label: Research Accommodation & Flights
description: Present 4-6 flight options and 4-6 lodging options per overnight location when available, with live-data caveats and tradeoffs

label: Final Plan
description: Reconcile selected choices into the complete itinerary, transport plan, budget, map-ready stops, and essential information
